name: delegate
description: Delegate tasks from Codex to Claude Code, Google Antigravity, Pi, or Qwen Code.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate Codex tasks to Claude, Antigravity, Pi, or Qwen Code.
interface.longDescription: Run and supervise delegated coding jobs through Claude Code, Google Antigravity, oh-my-pi, or Qwen Code, with exact-session follow-up and shared lifecycle controls.
defaultPrompt: Set up Codex Delegation.
Preflight Claude Code auth, model access, browser, workspace, and permission mode.
Delegate a task to Claude Code.
Check my Claude jobs.
Wait for a Claude job to finish or report a blocker.
Show the result of a Claude job.
Stop a Claude job.
Send a follow-up instruction to a running Claude job.
Review the output of a Claude job.
Get an independent second-opinion review of a Claude job.
Run a Claude Code dynamic workflow (multi-step, plan + execute).
Set a goal condition for a Claude Code session.
Fork a Claude Code subagent for a directive.
Run a batch of parallel Claude Code instructions.
Run a Claude Code dynamic deep-research workflow on a question.
List my Claude Code workflow sessions.
List installed Claude Code skills.
Upgrade or refresh the installed Codex Delegation plugin.
Check Google Antigravity CLI readiness.
Delegate a task to Google Antigravity.
Check my Antigravity jobs.
Attach to an Antigravity job's persistent native TUI.
Wait for an Antigravity job to finish.
Show the result of an Antigravity job.
Stop an Antigravity job.
Preflight Antigravity conversation resume, workspace, and permission readiness.
Continue an exact Antigravity conversation.
Review the output of an Antigravity job in the same conversation.
Get an independent Antigravity review in a fresh conversation.
Run a phased multi-agent Antigravity workflow.
Set a verified completion goal for Antigravity.
Ask Antigravity to spawn an independent subagent.
Run a batch of parallel Antigravity work.
Run multi-agent deep research with Antigravity.
List my Antigravity workflow-like jobs.
List installed Antigravity skills.
Refresh Codex Delegation's Antigravity skills.
Check oh-my-pi readiness.
Preflight Pi exact resume, workspace, and headless permission policy.
Delegate a task to Pi.
Check my Pi jobs.
Wait for a Pi job to finish.
Show the result of a Pi job.
Stop a Pi job.
Continue an exact Pi session.
Check Qwen Code readiness.
Preflight Qwen Code exact resume, workspace, and headless permission policy.
Delegate a task to Qwen Code.
Check my Qwen Code jobs.
Wait for a Qwen Code job to finish.
Show the result of a Qwen Code job.
Stop a Qwen Code job.
Continue an exact Qwen Code session.
